kirundi.win_battleship_in_30_shots_or_fewer: Tsinda Battleship mu masasu 30 canke make
kirundi.colored_regions_are_the_four_quadrants: 🗺 Uduce dufite amabara ni uduce 4. Hindura inita y'icerekezo hepfo kugira ngo urabe uko inyura.
kirundi.q_i_both_positive_top_right_q_ii_x_is_: Q I vyombi nziza (hejuru iburyo). Q II x mbi (hejuru ibumoso). Q III vyombi mbi (hasi ibumoso). Q IV y mbi (hasi iburyo). Imibare y'Abaroma izenguruka inyuranye n'isaha kuva hejuru iburyo.
kirundi.across_the_x_axis_y_flips_across_the_y: Kunyura ku murongo x: y irahinduka. Kunyura ku murongo y: x irahinduka. Kunyura ku nkomoko: vyombi birahinduka. Ni impinduka yoroshe cane muri geometrie y'ibipimo.
kirundi.columns_files_are_letters_a_h_rows_ran: Inkingi ni inyuguti a-h. Imirongo ni imibare 1-8. Buri kazu gafite igipimo c'inyuguti+umubare. Umwamikazi w'umweru atangurira kuri d1, umwami w'umukara kuri e8.
kirundi.type_the_chess_notation_for_the_highli: Andika ikimenyetso ca chess c'akazu kagaragajwe
kirundi.alternates_two_directions_see_the_squa: Ihindagurika icerekezo kibiri: raba akazu uhe izina, umve izina ushake. 5 zikurikiranye zitsinda ikimenyetso ♟️ Inararibonye ya Chess.
kirundi.chess_notation_works_because_it_pairs_: 💡 Ikimenyetso ca chess gikora kuko gifatanya gahunda y'imibare imwe (inyuguti nk'ahantu) n'indi (imibare nk'ahantu). «Izina» ry'akazu ni igipimo cako, gusa canditswe ukundi kuruta (5, 4).
kirundi.click_any_cell_to_fire_hit_miss_a_ship: Fyonda akazu ako ari ko kose kugira ngo urase. 💥 = vyagezweho, · = vyabuze. Ubwato burohama iyo utuzu twabwo twose tugezweho.
kirundi.type_a_battleship_coordinate_like_b5_t: Andika igipimo ca Battleship nka B5, hanyuma ufyonde Enter kugira ngo urase
kirundi.or_tab_through_cells_and_press_enter: canke koresha Tab unyure mu tuzu maze ufyonde Enter
kirundi.naval_coordinates_work_the_same_way_as: Ibipimo vy'ingabo z'amazi bikora kimwe n'ibipimo vy'imibare. Inyuguti + umubare = inita ku rusobe.
kirundi.lat_tells_you_how_far_north_south_of_t: Uburebure bukubwira intera y'amajaruguru/amajepfo ya ekwateri (0° kugeza 90°, amajaruguru nziza, amajepfo mbi). Uburambe bukubwira intera y'iburasirazuba/iburengerazuba bwa meridiyani nkuru (−180° kugeza 180°). Buri hantu ku Isi hafite imibare ibiri.
kirundi.practice_mode_find_the_place_from_its_: 🎯 Uburyo bwo kwitoza — shaka ahantu uhereye ku bipimo vyaho
kirundi.click_on_the_map_above_within_15_of_th: Fyonda ikarita iri hejuru. Muri 15° y'intego biharurwa nk'ukuri.
kirundi.trains_spatial_reasoning_lat_lon_to_a_: Itoza kwiyumvira ku mwanya: kuva ku burebure/uburambe kugeza ku mwanya ku mubumbe. 5 z'ukuri zitsinda ikimenyetso 🌍 Inzobere mu Bumenyi bw'Isi.
kirundi.every_lat_lon_pair_is_a_coordinate_jus: 💡 Buri nyabibiri (uburebure, uburambe) ni igipimo nka (x, y), gusa ku rugero rw'umubumbe. Uburebure mbi = amajepfo, uburambe mbi = iburengerazuba. GPS, amakarita y'ikirere, kuyobora amato — vyose iciyumviro kimwe.
kirundi.why_these_are_all_coordinate_planes: 💡 Kuki ibi vyose ari urwego rw'ibipimo
kirundi.latitude_longitude_degrees_north_south: Uburebure + uburambe: dogere z'amajaruguru/amajepfo + dogere z'iburasirazuba/iburengerazuba.
kirundi.same_two_number_pair_idea_scaled_to_a_: Iciyumviro kimwe c'inyabibiri y'imibare ibiri, cagejejwe ku mupira. Portland, Maine iri kuri (43.66°N, 70.26°W). GPS, ikirere, kuyobora amato: vyose ibipimo.
kirundi.every_grid_system_in_the_world_is_a_fi: Buri gahunda y'urusobe ku isi ni inyabibiri (umubare wa mbere, umubare wa kabiri). Igihe umunyeshure abonye ko ikimenyetso ca chess na (x, y) ari kimwe, urusobe rwa aljebra ntirukomeza kumvikana nk'ikidasanzwe.
kirundi.hypothesis_what_sign_combinations_defi: Iciyumviro: Ni irihe huriro ry'ibimenyetso risigura buri kadu?
kirundi.place_a_point_in_each_quadrant_look_at: Shira inita muri buri kadu. Raba ibimenyetso.
kirundi.explain_the_sign_pattern_that_defines_: Sigura uburyo bw'ikimenyetso busigura buri kadu.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_7_state_region_ma: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso c'akarere kihariye gifite imimerere 7; nta manota y'ibipimo; nta gukura ku ibanga — ku bushake.
kirundi.c_connect_mode_r_clear_ai_tutor: ⌨️ C: uburyo bwo guhuza | R: siba | ?: umwigisha wa AI
